proposed_entries.title: Single Netlify project per site (not two) — branch deploys handle staging
proposed_entries.body: Decided against a separate <tag>-staging Netlify project. One Netlify project per site, with native branch deploys serving staging at <tag>--staging.netlify.app and the production branch (main) serving the custom domain. Simpler, matches Netlify native pattern.
proposed_entries.auto_promote_reason: type 'decision' not in allowlist {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern}
